prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第68位持续上升至2026年第61位，近年排名稳步提升， 学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理等后勤争议，对报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），短视频曝光量 较高，反映报考关注度处于中上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范类和心理学学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热，与西南大学开设的计算机、软件、电气等专业高度契合；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数 约29.9万，按近年比例估算物理类约20.8万人，较2025年（20.7万）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；西南大学位于重庆，与贵州相邻 ，属西南地区，对贵州考生有天然的地域亲近性和交通便利优势；该校在贵州招生规模较大（物理类常年300人以上），是贵州考生报考西南地区211的重要选择。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28044、2026年小幅缩招（-4.1%）、学校排名持续上升（软科61位）、抖音热度较热、本省物理类考生略有增加等因素，但学校排名提升和考生增加形成对冲；预计2026年最低录取位次约27402名，较2025年略有上升（更难进），区间26902–27902名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 38166 → 34440 → 26852 → 28703 → 28044, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the recent three years, it fluctuated within the range of 26852–28703; the 2025 baseline is approximately 28044. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 373 in 2021, 379 in 2022, 366 in 2023, 347 in 2024, and 389 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 373, a decrease of 16 (-4.1%) compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, which somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with a consistent improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving logistical controversies such as food delivery management, which has limited impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating above-average application attention. No significant admission gaps have been observed. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) highlight strong disciplines in teacher training and psychology, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, closely matching Southwest University's offerings in Computer Science, Software, and Electrical Engineering. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Gaokao is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 208,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (207,000), leading to a minor intensification of competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Guizhou, belonging to the Southwest region, offering natural geographical affinity and transportation convenience for Guizhou candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Guizhou (Physics Category consistently over 300), making it an important choice for Guizhou candidates applying to 211 universities in the Southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28044, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.1%), the university's rising ranking (Soft Science 61st), high Douyin popularity, and a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, but with the university's ranking improvement and candidate increase offsetting each other, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 27402, slightly higher (harder to enter) than 2025, with a range of 26902–27902.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 27402, range 26902–27902. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 26902) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Software, and Electrical Engineering. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 27400) should primarily target Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 27900) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, and may also consider related majors at the Rongchang Campus. Although Applied Psychology (A-level discipline) is in Tier 2, its strong academic strength makes it worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 5842 → 4311 → 3443 → 3347 → 2868, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative increase of about 2974 places over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2868. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 63 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 31, a decrease of 8 (-20.5%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with a stable improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving logistical controversies such as food delivery management, but the impact on application psychology is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Education (A), Psychology (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) are strong disciplines, with deep roots in teacher training and humanities, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Teacher Training/Education show differentiated but overall high popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou general college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 90,600 in the History Category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (90,100). Southwest University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Guizhou, in the Southwest region, offering natural regional affinity for Guizhou candidates. The university's History Category enrollment scale in Guizhou is moderate (30–60 people in recent years), making it an important choice for Guizhou liberal arts candidates applying to 211 teacher training universities in the Southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2868, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-20.5%), the continuous rise in university ranking, and the basically stable number of History Category candidates, the substantial enrollment reduction actually intensifies competition. Combined with the university's ranking improvement and the popularity of liberal arts majors, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 2565, slightly higher (harder to enter) than 2025, with a range of 2065–3065.
